mapper.delete: DELETE FROM xeus.gis_lyr_list WHERE schem_nm = #{schemNm} AND tbl_id = #{tblId};
mapper.select: INSERT INTO xeus.gis_lyr_list ( schem_nm, tbl_id, lyr_nm, lyr_typ, grp_mgr_seq, mk_user, lyr_zidx) VALUES ( #{ schemNm }, #{ tblId }, #{ lyrNm }, #{ lyrTyp }, #{ grpMgrSeq }:: NUMERIC, #{ mkUser }, (select coalesce(max(lyr_zidx)+1, 1) from xeus.gis_lyr_list where grp_mgr_seq = #{grpMgrSeq}::numeric) ) RETURNING *;

update.foreach: UPDATE xeus.gis_lyr_list SET lyr_zidx = #{map.lyrZidx}::numeric WHERE mgr_seq = #{map.mgrSeq}::numeric;
